text: | **Orchestration** | Auth rejection (warn), parent mismatch (warn), already-claimed (debug), identity mint, spawn outcome | [...]      - `handle_orchestration`: replaced debug-gated and unconditional `eprintln!` with tracing::warn (auth rejection, parent mismatch), tracing::debug (already claimed), tracing::info (identity mint, spawn success), tracing::error (spawn failure)
